items.name: ID
items.purpose: Encrypted UserId

items.name: LOGIN
items.purpose: Used when rememberMe is enabled.

items.name: PASSWORD
items.purpose: Encrypted userPassword. Used when rememberMe is enabled.

items.name: REMEMBER_ME
items.purpose: User can skip user authentication from the same device where the user previously authenticated.

items.name: SAML_SP_SESSION_KEY
items.purpose: Enables the DXP SAML SP to participate in SAML SLO (Single Log Out).

items.name: SAML_SSO_SESSION_ID
items.purpose: Enabled the SAML IDP SSO session to have a longer lifetime than the user's HttpSession with that IDP. The cookie causes new authenticated HttpSessions to be automatically created on demand.

items.name: COOKIE_SUPPORT
items.purpose: Used to determine if cookies can actually be saved to the browser.

items.name: CONSENT_TYPE_FUNCTIONAL
items.purpose: Stores the end users consent for the functional cookies, its value is true or false. Only stored when the Cookie Preference Handling function is enabled.

items.name: CONSENT_TYPE_NECESSARY
items.purpose: Stores the end users consent for the functional cookies, its value is always true. Only stored when the Cookie Preference Handling function is enabled.

items.name: CONSENT_TYPE_PERFORMANCE
items.purpose: Stores the end users consent for the performance cookies, its value is true or false. Only stored when the Cookie Preference Handling function is enabled.

items.name: CONSENT_TYPE_PERSONALIZATION
items.purpose: Stores the end users consent for the personalization cookies, its value is true or false. Only stored when the Cookie Preference Handling function is enabled.

items.name: COMMERCE_CONTINUE_AS_GUEST
items.purpose: Allows user to checkout an order as guest with no need to login.

items.name: com.liferay.commerce.model.CommerceOrder#groupId
items.purpose: Allows user to checkout an order as guest with no need to login.

items.name: com.liferay.commerce.wish.list.model.CommerceWishList#groupId
items.purpose: Allows guest user to make guest wishlist that eventually become the user wishlist.

items.name: com.liferay.commerce.model.CommerceOrder#groupId
items.purpose: The cookie is needed to store PunchOut contextual order.

items.name: COMMERCE_COMPARE_cpDefinitionIds_commerceChannelGroupId
items.purpose: Allows user to compare products.

items.name: LFR_SESSION_STATE_userID
items.purpose: Manages session extension/invalidation when user does not use “Remember Me” feature.

items.name: activeWorkspaceId
items.purpose: Was used to identify the current workspace they're on so that we can show the user the correct tier of the zendesk help widget. However this is not required anymore because we do not use the zendesk widget anymore so we can remove the code for this.

items.name: subscriptions
items.purpose: Was used to identify the current workspace they're on so that we can show the user the correct tier of the zendesk help widget. However this is not required anymore because we do not use the zendesk widget anymore so we can remove the code for this.

items.name: sidebar
items.purpose: Used to determine if the sidebar should be open/closed based on the user's last session.

items.name: maintenanceSeen
items.purpose: Used to determine if the server maintenance message should be displayed to the user based on whether the user has dismissed it or not.

items.name: _com_liferay_portal_search_admin_web_portlet_SearchAdminPortlet_userID_hideReindexConfirmationModal
items.purpose: Used to hide the confirmation modal when a reindex action is executed if a user checks “Do not show me again”.

items.name: com.liferay.search.experiences.web_addSXPElementSidebar
items.purpose: Used to determine if the Add Query Elements sidebar should be opened/closed while changing tabs in the  Edit Blueprint page.

items.name: com.liferay.search.experiences.web_successMessage
items.purpose: Used to display a success message toast when saving a blueprint.

items.name: ab_test_variant_id
items.purpose: Used to store the current experience served by A/B Testing to the user.

items.name: ac_client_user_id
items.purpose: Used to store the current userId from AC.

items.name: liferay.cookie.consent
items.purpose: If the user has consented to the use of cookies through the fragment.

items.name: GUEST_LANGUAGE_ID
items.purpose: Sets the language ID to use when the user's language ID is not available.

items.name: acess_token
items.purpose: Identifies the logged in user in the cloud console and cloud admin.

items.name: connect.sid
items.purpose: Identifies a single session in Express Server (backend).

items.name: _hjSessionUser
items.purpose: Generated by hotjar - online behavior analysis tool - Set when a user first lands on a page.

items.name: _hjIncludedInPageviewSample
items.purpose: Generated by hotjar - online behavior analysis tool.

items.name: _hjSession
items.purpose: Generated by hotjar - online behavior analysis tool - Holds current session data.

items.name: _hjFirstSeen
items.purpose: Generated by hotjar - online behavior analysis tool - Identifies a new user's first session.

items.name: _hjIncludedInSessionSample
items.purpose: Generated by hotjar - online behavior analysis tool.

items.name: _hjAbsoluteSessionInProgress
items.purpose: Generated by hotjar - online behavior analysis tool.

items.name: _gid
items.purpose: Generated by Google Analytics.

items.name: _ga
items.purpose: Generated by Google Analytics.

items.name: _gat_gtag_UA_*
items.purpose: Generated by Google Analytics.

items.name: __zlcmid
items.purpose: Generated by Zendesk to identify a users session.

items.name: SERVER_ID
items.purpose: Generated by the Webserver Service.

items.name: SELECTED_CATEGORIES_COOKIE_
items.purpose: Lasts 20 seconds when opening the categories selector popup, helping to add more than 400 categories.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_EXPANDED_TEXT
items.purpose: Browser Local Storage is used to store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_INCREASED_TEXT_SPACING
items.purpose: Browser Local Storage is used to store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_REDUCED_MOTION
items.purpose: Browser Local Storage is used to store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_UNDERLINED_LINKS1
items.purpose: Browser Local Storage is used to store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users.

items.name: OAUTH2_REMEMBER_DEVICE_
items.purpose: User can skip OAuth 2 authorization flow from the same device where the user previously authorized.

items.name: userTokenName
items.purpose: In tokenSSO, a token could be stored in cookie so user agent can stay logged in.

items.name: COMPANY_ID
items.purpose: Company Id
